zh.Trerice Manor, Newquay, Cornwall, Englan: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾紐華
zh.Trigg Manor, Trigg, Cornwall, England: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾特利格
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joane de Kernick於1265年出生在英國可瓦爾特利格時，她的父親Sir Oger Keningk Lord of Trigg18歲，母親Constance de Bloigho20歲。她和Sir John le Seneschal至少有2個女兒。她去世於1349年8月1日在英國可瓦爾博德明享年84歲。

zh-hans.Trerice Manor, Newquay, Cornwall, Englan: 英国英格兰可瓦爾紐華
zh-hans.Trigg Manor, Trigg, Cornwall, England: 英国英格兰可瓦爾特利格
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joane de Kernick于1265年出生在英国可瓦爾特利格时，她的父亲Sir Oger Keningk Lord of Trigg18岁，母亲Constance de Bloigho20岁。她和Sir John le Seneschal至少有2个女儿。她去世于1349年8月1日在英国可瓦爾博德明享年84岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Kernick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cornish (Cornwall and Devon): habitational name from one or more of the eight places called Kernick in Cornwall. The placenames derive from Middle Cornish kernyk ‘little corner, little horn’.

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Joane de Kernick was born in 1265, in Trigg, Cornwall, England, her father, Sir Oger Keningk Lord of Trigg, was 18 and her mother, Constance de Bloigho, was 20. She had at least 2 daughters with Sir John le Seneschal. She died on 1 August 1349, in Bodmin, Cornwall, England, at the age of 84.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joane de Kernick est née en 1265, à Trigg, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Sir Oger Keningk Lord of Trigg, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Constance de Bloigho, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 filles avec Sir John le Seneschal. Elle est décédée le 1 août 1349, à Bodmin, Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 84 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joane de Kernick 1265 in Trigg, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Oger Keningk Lord of Trigg 18 und ihre Mutter Constance de Bloigho 20. Sie hatte mit Sir John le Seneschal mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 1. August 1349 im Alter von 84 Jahren in Bodmin, Cornwall, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joane de Kernick è nata il nel 1265 nel Trigg, Cornwall, England, sua padre, Sir Oger Keningk Lord of Trigg, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Constance de Bloigho, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figlie con Sir John le Seneschal. Morì il 1 agosto 1349, nel Bodmin, Cornwall, England, all'età di 84 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Joane de Kernickが1265年にイギリスコルンワルトリググで生まれた時，父Sir Oger Keningk Lord of Triggは18歳，母Constance de Bloighoは20歳であった。彼女はSir John le Seneschalとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1349年8月1日にイギリスコルンワルボドミンで84歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joane de Kernick(이)가 1265년 영국 코른월 트리그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Oger Keningk Lord of Trigg(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Constance de Bloigho(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Sir John le Seneschal(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1349년 8월 1일 영국 코른월 보드민에서 84세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Trerice Manor, Newquay, Cornwall, Englan: Tewynblustri, Kernev, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.Trigg Manor, Trigg, Cornwall, England: Trigg, Kernev, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joane de Kernick nasceu em 1265, em Trigg, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Oger Keningk Lord of Trigg, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Constance de Bloigho, tinha 20 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Sir John le Seneschal. Ela faleceu em 1 de agosto de 1349, em Bodmin, Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 84 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joane de Kernick родилась в 1265 г. в местности триг, корнвалл, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Oger Keningk Lord of Trigg было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Constance de Bloigho, 20. У неё было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Sir John le Seneschal. Она умерла 1 августа 1349 г. в местности бодминь, корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 84 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joane de Kernick nació en 1265, en Trigg, Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Oger Keningk Lord of Trigg, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Constance de Bloigho, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Sir John le Seneschal. Murió el 1 de agosto de 1349, en Bodmin, Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 84 años.
